title: Traublinger
description: ***.de Backerei Traublinger is a traditional, family-owned German bakery and confectionery company founded in 1912, headquartered near Munich in Bavaria.With over a century of heritage and around 165 employees, they expertly blend time-honored artisanal baking craftsmanship with modern culinary innovation.The company produces and distributes a wide variety of premium breads, pastries, cakes, and snacks through its extensive network of local retail branches across the region
